item.name: Mystic Panda Pipe
item.description: A hand-carved flute whose song will summon a mystic panda down from the mist-covered mountains of Othard's Fanged Crescent.

mount.name: Mystic Panda
mount.action: Summon forth your mystic panda. From Doma. From a thousand years ago.
mount.description: Armed with the unexplainable ability to levitate...and little else, this thousand-year-old creature (age unconfirmed) has descended the ancient peaks of the Othardian Fanged Crescent in search of a hero to help Doma wrench free from the iron clutches of the Garlean Empire.
mount.tooltip:
Used to be prime huntin' grounds...
that is, till the bears moved in.
- Tailfeather Hunter
